description_long: This object is a long, slender loaf of bread resembling a classic French baguette. Its surface is golden-brown with a matte finish and features a series of diagonal, shallow cuts or scores along the top, giving it a rustic, artisanal appearance. The crust appears crisp and slightly uneven, with gentle undulations and a few deeper creases, suggesting a hand-shaped preparation. The ends of the loaf are rounded and slightly tapered, typical of traditional baguettes. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or branding on the exterior. The bread looks solid and unsliced, with a likely soft, airy interior beneath the firm crust.
description: A golden-brown, unsliced baguette with diagonal scoring and a rustic, crisp crust. The loaf is long, slender, and slightly tapered at the ends.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the baguette, highlighting the diagonal scoring and undulating crust.
description_view_1: End view displaying the rounded, slightly tapered tip and the width of the loaf.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the length, scoring, and crust texture, similar to view 0.
description_view_3: View from the other end, showing the rounded tip and the loaf's width, mirroring view 1.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust features a series of diagonal, shallow scores along the top, creating a rustic, hand-crafted look. The surface is uneven and undulating, with no visible flour dusting or seeds.
